tasks.label: Debug Vercel Handler
tasks.command: cd "c:\Users\wilalr\OneDrive\Documentos\GitHub\ipsasel" && node -e "const handler = require('./api/index'); const event = { httpMethod:'GET', path:'/', headers:{host:'localhost'}, queryStringParameters:null, body:null, isBase64Encoded:false}; const context={}; handler(event, context).then(res=>console.log('RESULT', res && res.statusCode, typeof res.body==='string'?res.body.slice(0,200):res.body)).catch(err=>{ console.error('ERROR', err && err.stack ? err.stack : err); process.exit(1); });"
